commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 20. "He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish" (ver. 29). "He made their land frogs, yea, even in the king's chambers" (ver. 30): as if he were to say, He turned their land into frogs. For there was so great a multitude of frogs, that this might well be said by hyperbole.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Land. Including the rivers, Exodus vii. 1., and viii. 3.
Kings, or noblemen. (Berthier)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure

methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
